queries.question: For every hair stylist, give me the styles that they offer
queries.sql: select hair_stylists.name , styles.style_name from Hair_Stylists_Styles join Styles on Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id = Styles.style_id join Hair_Stylists on Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id = Hair_Stylists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?style_name WHERE {
  ?hair_stylists_styles a :Hair_Stylists_Styles .
  ?styles a :Styles .
  ?hair_stylists_styles p:hasStyles ?styles .
  ?hair_stylists a :Hair_Stylists .
  ?hair_stylists_styles p:hasHair_Stylists ?hair_stylists .
  ?hair_stylists p:name ?name .
  ?styles p:style_name ?style_name .
}

queries.question: For each hair stylist, list information on the styles offered (including their descriptions).
queries.sql: select hair_stylists.name , styles.style_name , styles.description from Hair_Stylists_Styles join Styles on Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id = Styles.style_id join Hair_Stylists on Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id = Hair_Stylists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?style_name ?description WHERE {
  ?hair_stylists_styles a :Hair_Stylists_Styles .
  ?styles a :Styles .
  ?hair_stylists_styles p:hasStyles ?styles .
  ?hair_stylists a :Hair_Stylists .
  ?hair_stylists_styles p:hasHair_Stylists ?hair_stylists .
  ?hair_stylists p:name ?name .
  ?styles p:style_name ?style_name .
  ?styles p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What styles are available at every hair stylist?
queries.sql: SELECT Styles.style_name  from Hair_Stylists_Styles join Styles on Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id = Styles.style_id join Hair_Stylists on Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id = Hair_Stylists.id   GROUP BY Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hair_Stylists)

queries.question: What is the style description that is in common for all hair stylists?
queries.sql: SELECT Styles.description  from Hair_Stylists_Styles join Styles on Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id = Styles.style_id join Hair_Stylists on Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id = Hair_Stylists.id   GROUP BY Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hair_Stylists)

queries.question: Tell me about the styles every hair stylist offers (with their descriptions).
queries.sql: SELECT Styles.style_name, Styles.description  from Hair_Stylists_Styles join Styles on Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id = Styles.style_id join Hair_Stylists on Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id = Hair_Stylists.id   GROUP BY Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hair_Stylists)

queries.question: For each hair stylist, give me the style description.
queries.sql: select hair_stylists.name , styles.description from Hair_Stylists_Styles join Styles on Hair_Stylists_Styles.style_id = Styles.style_id join Hair_Stylists on Hair_Stylists_Styles.hairdresser_id = Hair_Stylists.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?hair_stylists_styles a :Hair_Stylists_Styles .
  ?styles a :Styles .
  ?hair_stylists_styles p:hasStyles ?styles .
  ?hair_stylists a :Hair_Stylists .
  ?hair_stylists_styles p:hasHair_Stylists ?hair_stylists .
  ?hair_stylists p:name ?name .
  ?styles p:description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What styles are available at every hair stylist?
Tell me about the styles every hair stylist offers (with their descriptions).
Show me the style description for each hair stylist.
